import sys
sys.path.append(''backend'')
from backend.app.services.search_service import SearchService
import os

service = SearchService()
test_file = ''backend/uploads/2c33c36e-76c1-45a5-b1fe-d5bb247a31d0.xlsx''
if os.path.exists(test_file):
    result = service.extract_file_content(test_file)
    if result:
        print(''Content length:'', len(result))
        print(''Contains Unicode table chars:'', any(char in result for char in [''┌'', ''├'', ''┐'', ''│'', ''┬'', ''┼'', ''┴'', ''─'', ''┤'', ''┘'', ''└'']))
        print(''First 200 chars:'')
        print(repr(result[:200]))
    else:
        print(''No content extracted'')
else:
    print(''Test file not found'')
")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=backend python -c "
import sys
sys.path.append(''backend'')
from backend.app.services.search_service import SearchService
import os

service = SearchService()
test_file = ''backend/uploads/2c33c36e-76c1-45a5-b1fe-d5bb247a31d0.xlsx''
if os.path.exists(test_file):
    print(''=== 测试修复后的Excel处理 ==='')
    result = service.extract_file_content(test_file)
    if result:
        print(''✅ 内容提取成功'')
        print(f''📊 内容长度: {len(result)} 字符'')
        print(f''📏 总行数: {len(result.split(chr(10)))}'')
        
        # 检查是否包含Unicode表格字符
        unicode_chars = [''┌'', ''├'', ''┐'', ''│'', ''┬'', ''┼'', ''┴'', ''─'', ''┤'', ''┘'', ''└'']
        has_unicode_table = any(char in result for char in unicode_chars)
        print(f''🎨 包含Unicode表格: {has_unicode_table}'')
        
        # 检查是否包含分段标识（应该没有）
        has_segment = ''分段显示'' in result or ''第 1 段'' in result
        print(f''📑 包含分段显示: {has_segment} (应该为False)'')
        
        # 检查是否包含记录式显示
        has_record_format = ''=== 第'' in result and ''条记录 ==='' in result
        print(f''📝 使用记录式显示: {has_record_format}'')
        
        # 检查表格质量指标
        has_report_header = ''Excel文件完整分析报告'' in result
        has_navigation = ''工作表导航目录'' in result
        print(f''📋 包含分析报告: {has_report_header}'')
        print(f''🧭 包含导航目录: {has_navigation}'')
        
        # 保存测试结果
        with open(''excel_test_result.txt'', ''w'', encoding=''utf-8'') as f:
            f.write(''=== Excel处理优化后测试结果 ===\n'')
            f.write(f''文件: {test_file}\n'')
            f.write(f''内容长度: {len(result)}\n'')
            f.write(f''Unicode表格: {has_unicode_table}\n'')
            f.write(f''分段显示: {has_segment}\n'')
            f.write(f''记录式显示: {has_record_format}\n'')
            f.write(''='' * 50 + ''\n'')
            f.write(result[:2000])  # 保存前2000个字符用于检查
            if len(result) > 2000:
                f.write(''\n\n[内容被截断，实际更长...]'')
        
        print(''\n📁 详细结果已保存到: excel_test_result.txt'')
        print(''\n🎯 修复效果总结:'')
        if has_unicode_table and not has_segment:
            print(''✅ 成功：生成Unicode表格，无分段显示'')
        elif has_unicode_table:
            print(''⚠️  部分成功：有Unicode表格但可能仍有分段'')
        else:
            print(''❌ 需要检查：未检测到Unicode表格格式'')
            
    else:
        print(''❌ 内容提取失败'')
else:
    print(''❌ 测试文件不存在'')
")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=backend python -c "
import sys
sys.path.append(''backend'')
from backend.app.services.search_service import SearchService
import os

service = SearchService()
test_file = ''backend/uploads/2c33c36e-76c1-45a5-b1fe-d5bb247a31d0.xlsx''
if os.path.exists(test_file):
    result = service.extract_file_content(test_file)
    if result:
        # 保存完整结果进行分析
        with open(''excel_optimized_result.txt'', ''w'', encoding=''utf-8'') as f:
            f.write(result)
        print(''Result saved to excel_optimized_result.txt'')
        print(''Content length:'', len(result))
        print(''Lines count:'', len(result.split(''\n'')))
        # 检查关键指标
        has_unicode = any(char in result for char in [''┌'', ''├'', ''┐'', ''│''])
        has_segment = ''分段显示'' in result
        print(''Unicode table:'', has_unicode)
        print(''Has segmentation:'', has_segment)
    else:
        print(''Failed to extract'')
else:
    print(''File not found'')
")

import sys
sys.path.append(''backend'')
from backend.app.services.search_service import SearchService
import os

service = SearchService()
test_file = ''backend/uploads/2c33c36e-76c1-45a5-b1fe-d5bb247a31d0.xlsx''
if os.path.exists(test_file):
    result = service.extract_file_content(test_file)
    if result:
        with open(''excel_fixed_result.txt'', ''w'', encoding=''utf-8'') as f:
            f.write(result)
        print(''Fixed result saved to excel_fixed_result.txt'')
        print(''Content length:'', len(result))
        print(''Lines count:'', len(result.split(''\n'')))
        
        # 检查关键格式指标
        has_unicode_table = any(char in result for char in [''┌'', ''├'', ''┐'', ''│'', ''┬'', ''┼'', ''┴'', ''─'', ''┤'', ''┘'', ''└''])
        has_segment = ''分段显示'' in result
        has_record_format = ''=== 第'' in result and ''条记录 ==='' in result
        has_proper_table = ''┌'' in result and ''┐'' in result and ''└'' in result and ''┘'' in result
        
        print(''Unicode table chars:'', has_unicode_table)
        print(''Segmentation:'', has_segment)
        print(''Record format:'', has_record_format)
        print(''Complete table structure:'', has_proper_table)
        
        if has_proper_table and not has_segment and not has_record_format:
            print(''SUCCESS: High-quality Unicode table generated!'')
        else:
            print(''Need to check: Format may need further optimization'')
    else:
        print(''Failed to extract'')
else:
    print(''File not found'')
")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=backend python -c "
import sys
sys.path.append(''backend'')
from backend.app.core.database import engine
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text
import os

# 检查数据库连接
db_path = ''backend/yunwei_docs.db''
if os.path.exists(db_path):
    try:
        # 创建数据库连接
        engine = create_engine(f''sqlite:///{db_path}'')
        
        # 查询该文件的记录
        with engine.connect() as conn:
            result = conn.execute(text(''''''
                SELECT id, title, file_path, created_at, updated_at 
                FROM documents 
                WHERE file_path LIKE ''%2c33c36e-76c1-45a5-b1fe-d5bb247a31d0%''
            ''''''))
            
            records = result.fetchall()
            if records:
                print(f''找到 {len(records)} 条数据库记录:'')
                for record in records:
                    print(f''ID: {record[0]}'')
                    print(f''标题: {record[1]}'')
                    print(f''文件路径: {record[2]}'')
                    print(f''创建时间: {record[3]}'')
                    print(f''更新时间: {record[4]}'')
                    print(''-'' * 50)
            else:
                print(''数据库中未找到该文件的记录'')
                
    except Exception as e:
        print(f''数据库查询失败: {e}'')
else:
    print(''数据库文件不存在'')
")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=C:Usersccclyyunweiruanjianbackend python -c "
import sys
sys.path.append(''C:\Users\cccly\yunweiruanjian\backend'')
from app.services.search_service import SearchService
import os

service = SearchService()
test_file = ''C:\Users\cccly\yunweiruanjian\backend\uploads\2c33c36e-76c1-45a5-b1fe-d5bb247a31d0.xlsx''
if os.path.exists(test_file):
    print(''=== Excel表格对齐优化测试 ==='')
    result = service.extract_file_content(test_file)
    if result:
        # Save result for inspection
        with open(''C:\Users\cccly\yunweiruanjian\excel_final_test.txt'', ''w'', encoding=''utf-8'') as f:
            f.write(result)
        
        print(''✅ Excel处理测试完成'')
        print(f''📊 内容长度: {len(result)} 字符'')
        
        # Check for proper column formatting
        lines = result.split(''\n'')
        table_lines = [line for line in lines if ''    '' in line and len(line.strip()) > 10]  # Table lines with 4-space separators
        print(f''📋 检测到表格数据行数: {len(table_lines)}'')
        
        if table_lines:
            # Show first few table lines as sample
            print(''\n🔍 表格格式示例（前3行）:'')
            for i, line in enumerate(table_lines[:3]):
                # Split by 4 spaces to show column structure
                columns = line.split(''    '')
                print(f''  行{i+1}: {len(columns)}列'')
                for j, col in enumerate(columns[:4]):  # Show first 4 columns
                    col_preview = col[:15] + ''...'' if len(col) > 15 else col
                    print(f''    列{j+1}: ""{col_preview}""'')
            
            # Column alignment test
            first_table_line = table_lines[0]
            column_count = len(first_table_line.split(''    ''))
            print(f''\n📈 表格结构分析:'')
            print(f''   - 第一行列数: {column_count}'')
            print(f''   - 列分隔符: 4个空格 (""    "")'')
            print(f''   - 前端CSS: 等宽字体 + white-space: pre'')
        
        # Check for unwanted formatting text
        unwanted_patterns = [''第'', ''条记录'', ''excel文件内容'', ''=== 记录'']
        found_unwanted = []
        for pattern in unwanted_patterns:
            if pattern in result:
                found_unwanted.append(pattern)
        
        if found_unwanted:
            print(f''\n⚠️  仍包含多余格式化文本: {found_unwanted}'')
        else:
            print(''\n✅ 已清理多余格式化文本'')
        
        print(''\n📁 完整结果已保存到: C:\Users\cccly\yunweiruanjian\excel_final_test.txt'')
    else:
        print(''❌ 内容提取失败'')
else:
    print(f''❌ 测试文件不存在: {test_file}'')
")

from app.services.search_service import SearchService

print(''Testing Excel processing with 4-space column separators...'')

if os.path.exists(test_file):
    result = service.extract_file_content(test_file)
    if result:
        with open(r''C:\Users\cccly\yunweiruanjian\excel_final_test.txt'', ''w'', encoding=''utf-8'') as f:
            f.write(result)
        
        print(''SUCCESS: Excel processing completed'')
        print(''Content length:'', len(result), ''characters'')
        
        lines = result.split(''\n'')
        table_lines = [line for line in lines if ''    '' in line and len(line.strip()) > 10]
        print(''Table data lines found:'', len(table_lines))
        
        if table_lines:
            print(''Sample table structure:'')
            for i, line in enumerate(table_lines[:2]):
                columns = line.split(''    '')
                print(''  Row'', i+1, '':'', len(columns), ''columns'')
                for j, col in enumerate(columns[:3]):

        print(''Result saved to excel_final_test.txt'')
